note: Example campaign that ships with pendpost so first run shows real content. Everything here runs in mock mode (no credentials, no real posting). Delete this folder and its manifest entry when you start your own.

posts.caption: We built Acme so small teams can ship without the busywork. Three months in beta, hundreds of fixes, and now it is open. Tell us what you want next.
Launch day. Here is the 20-second tour of what Acme actually does.
posts.firstComment: Questions? Drop them here and we will answer every one.

posts.caption: A look behind the scenes before tomorrow's launch.
